title: Vendor Management System (VMS)
subtitle: Publishing Workforce Platform
summary: Designed and delivered a full-cycle publishing workforce platform serving 300+ active freelancers. Features include structured onboarding, competency assessment engine, role-based file access control, and automated billing workflows based on word counts. Integrated an AI-powered chat assistant for contextual vendor guidance.
problem: Manual vetting and onboarding of freelancers took days and billing was completely manual and error-prone.
solution: Built a competency assessment engine with real-time scoring and automated result tracking, reducing vendor vetting time from days to hours. Engineered invoice and billing workflows automating payment calculations based on word counts.

title: NEDIT
subtitle: XML Proofing Platform
summary: Enterprise-grade content editing and proofing platform enabling end-to-end content management, XML validation, and workflow automation for publishing operations. Includes advanced rich-text editing, ICE Plugin-based change tracking, and real-time multi-user collaboration using SignalR.
problem: Lack of real-time collaboration and accurate XML structural preservation during proofing.
solution: Developed advanced rich-text editing using TinyMCE with text formatting and dynamic image replacement. Built ICE Plugin-based change tracking and real-time multi-user collaboration using SignalR.

title: Employee Profiling Dashboard
subtitle: Analytics Platform
summary: Built KPI analytics dashboard with RBAC, ApexCharts visualizations, and smart filters — improving leadership visibility into team productivity metrics by 30%. Led full frontend lifecycle from UI/UX design through responsive component development to production deployment.
problem: Leadership lacked visibility into team productivity and aggregation queries were slow.
solution: Implemented Redis caching for aggregation queries and automated Excel export, reducing manual reporting effort by 40%.
